project.title: Proteomic analysis of Balneola and Vibrio isolates
project.projectDescription: Proteome profile of Balneola and Vibrio isolates established by next-generation proteomics
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Proteins were extracted and captured on SP3 beads, digested with trypsin, and the resulting peptides were analyzed by Q-Exactive HF tandem mass spectrometry.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: MS/MS spectra were analyzed by MASCOT, the results were then parsed, spectral counts and NSAF were extracted and compared.

labPIs.title: Dr
labPIs.affiliation: CEA-Marcoule, ProGénoMIX platform, DRF-Li2D, 30207 Bagnols-sur-Cèze, France
labPIs.name: Jean Armengaud

references.referenceLine: Lozano C, Kielbasa M, Gaillard JC, Miotello G, Pible O, Armengaud J. Identification and Characterization of Marine Microorganisms by Tandem Mass Spectrometry Proteotyping.  Microorganisms. 2022 10(4):719

Comment[GradientTime]: 30 min gradient (2.5% B from 0 to 1.5 min, 2.5–25% B from 1.5 to 26.5 min, and 25–40% B from 26.5 to 30 min)
Comment[AcquisitionMethod]: data-dependent acquisition mode with a Top20 strategy
Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance]: 5 ppm peptide tolerance during steps 2 and 3
Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages]: a maximum of two missed cleavages
Comment[Separation]: nanoscale PepMap 100 C18 nanoLC column (3 mm, 100 Å, 75 mm i.d. × 50 cm, Thermo Scientific)
